---
name: CAP specification alignment
about: Report a possible mismatch between capR and upstream CAP-Digest
title: "[spec-alignment] "
labels: []
assignees: []
---

## Affected upstream version

Specify CAP-Digest version, file, schema, fixture, or finding code.

## Affected capR behavior

Describe the implementation or documentation involved.

## Observed mismatch

Provide a minimal example without sensitive data.

## Classification

- [ ] capR implementation bug
- [ ] capR documentation bug
- [ ] vendoring error
- [ ] suspected upstream ambiguity
- [ ] possible normative change

## Compatibility impact

Does this affect text grammar, field IDs, manifest shape, finding codes, gate semantics, fixtures, or public conformance claims?

## Proposed action

Describe whether the fix belongs in capR, cap-docs, or both.
